name: ccaas-handoff-orchestrator
description: Standalone Azure Functions (v4 model) + Durable Functions backend that owns the long-running CCaaS->AI handoff. Invokes a published Microsoft Copilot Studio agent over the CUA-supported Direct-to-Engine channel (pva-engine-direct; classic Direct Line is kept for non-CUA testing - Computer Use is not supported on it, #112), drives Computer Use to file a FNOL, and returns a structured claim result. See docs/handoff-architecture-decision.md.
